narrative_role: Atto III, la rivelazione collettiva. Il gruppo comprende insieme.

prompt_components.shot_type: High-angle wide shot (slow crane from above)
prompt_components.subject: three figures forming a circle around the glowing orange compass which now rests on the white sand, the compass continues to pulse warm orange light
prompt_components.action: the figures stand still, contemplating; their long shadows extend outward from the compass in three directions; one slowly kneels closer; the orange light from the compass illuminates the underside of their faces and hands without revealing features
prompt_components.environment: white beach sand in soft afternoon golden light, ocean visible in the distance, the mysterious island's strange geometry just visible at frame edges
prompt_components.camera_movement: slow vertical crane downward from above, ending at a medium-high angle on the circle of figures
prompt_components.lighting: afternoon golden hour overall, plus the localized orange glow of the compass casting warm light upward onto the figures
prompt_components.mood: sacred, communal, the shared moment of understanding
prompt_components.audio_hint: gentle wind, distant waves, the sustained warm resonance of the compass continuing underneath, music begins to enter — a single piano note, sustained

acceptance_criteria: Tre figure visibili, mai volti chiari
Ombre lunghe che convergono al compasso
Glow arancione dal basso sulle figure
Audio: prima nota di musica entra
